summary: Frontend testing completed for Login page EAHEA badge, Back to Website link, Apply page EAHEA badge/footer, and Inter font. All 6 requested features verified and working correctly.
passed_tests: Login page shows EAHEA Accredited badge below sign-in form with Award icon
Login page shows EAHEA Accredited badge on image side (right panel)
Login page has 'Back to Website' link in green (#8cc63f) pointing to '/'
Login page logo links to landing page (href='/')
Login page has font-inter class applied
Apply page shows EAHEA Accredited badge at top below title
Apply page EAHEA badge shows 'European Union & International Recognition' text
Apply page has full footer with all sections (Companies, Schools, Nano-Diploma, Diploma, About Us, Resources)
Apply page footer shows EAHEA Accredited badge
Apply page footer shows contact email (admissions@gitb.lt)
Apply page footer shows social media links (4 icons)
Apply page footer shows copyright text '© 2026 GITB. All rights reserved. | Accredited by EAHEA'
Inter font applied to body in both apps (school + LMS)
School landing page loads courses from API - 5 course cards displayed
Courses from API: Venture Creation, Guidance and Counselling, Communication Skills in English II, Product Management, Data Analytics with Excel

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 6 requested features verified and working

context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) Login page (LMS) at https://gitb-school.preview.emergentagent.com/login has EAHEA badge and 'Back to Website' link. 2) Apply page (School app) at localhost:3001/apply has EAHEA badge at top and full footer. 3) Both apps use Inter font via @import. 4) School landing page loads 5 courses from /api/courses/public.

login_eahea_badge.description: EAHEA Accredited badge visible on login page (2 locations - form section + image panel)

login_back_to_website.description: 'Back to Website' link present, links to '/', styled in green (#8cc63f)

apply_eahea_badge.description: EAHEA Accredited badge at top of apply page with Award icon and 'European Union & International Recognition' text

apply_footer.description: Full footer with all sections (Companies, Schools, Nano-Diploma, Diploma, About Us, Resources), social links, EAHEA badge, copyright

inter_font.description: Inter font applied via CSS @import in both school (localhost:3001) and LMS apps

courses_from_api.description: 5 courses loaded from API on school landing page: Venture Creation, Guidance and Counselling, Communication Skills, Product Management, Data Analytics
